_comment: Known/available R2 audio object keys per edition date. Only list keys whose files ACTUALLY exist on R2 — publish.py injects these as localized.ja.audioURL; missing entries leave audioURL empty so iOS falls back to on-device TTS. Values are R2 object keys under the public base (https://pub-95a7558772874b48a645ad0c1604d784.r2.dev/<key>). Japanese only for now. 2026-06-25 uses the original root-level keys (already uploaded + confirmed working). New dates MUST use date-scoped keys: audio/YYYY-MM-DD/signal-0N-ja.mp3.
